content: An AI Agent Marketplace can be structured as a decentralized 'skill resume bank' where dynamically constructed multi-agent orchestrated pipelines automatically assemble themselves by pulling matched agent skills from the marketplace, like a film production crew that self-organizes from a union talent database based on the unique requirements of each unplanned project. This design eliminates the need for pre-coded pipeline blueprints, allowing pipelines to adapt their agent composition in real time to shifting task requirements.
